title: lithocarpus floccosus
intro: Lithocarpus floccosus, also known as the California tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Baja California. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus floccosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
